messages.content:
Bot1 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks
Me <EQUIPPED GEAR>: Equipped Leather Tunic to torso.
Me <EQUIPPED>: Now holding Stone Sword.
Me <EQUIPPED>: Now holding Bow.
Me <ALREADY FULL>: Hunger is already full (20/20).

- zombie id 22 is 3.1 blocks away
- zombie id 23 is 3.3 blocks away

Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

- zombie id 23
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Health low at 10.5 after taking 9.5 dmg. 2 zombies still active (22, 24). Bread dropped, will regroup at 0,0.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Threats cleared (22, 24 both neutralized). Health 5.4, will eat more bread. Moving to regroup at 0,0.
Me <MOVING>: Moving toward (0, 0, 0) with radius 1.
Me <ALREADY FULL>: Hunger is already full (20/20).
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: CRITICAL! Health 0.6! Took 17.9 damage. Need immediate support. Bot1, report status. Regroup needed now.

Bot1 <Event>: I just took damage.
- Health changed from 20.0 to 8.2 (11.8 lost)

arguments.message: CRITICAL! Bot1 health at 8.2! Both of us in danger. Need to retreat to safety immediately and eat. Bot1 status: health 8.2, need bread.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "CRITICAL! Bot1 health at 8.2! Both of us in danger. Need to retreat to safety immediately and eat. Bot1 status: health 8.2, need bread."
Me <SAFE>: No hostile mobs detected to retreat from.
Me <EATING>: Eating bread until hunger is full.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Status update: Health 0.6, eating bread. Bot1 report health and bread count. Both need to eat.

Bot1 <Event>: I used or lost:
- 1 Bread

arguments.message: Bot1 status: Health 8.2, bread 0 (just ate 1). Both critical! Need to eat bread and regroup. No hostiles nearby - safe for now. Keep eating, then we can assess damage and plan next move.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Bot1 status: Health 8.2, bread 0 (just ate 1). Both critical! Need to eat bread and regroup. No hostiles nearby - safe for now. Keep eating, then we can assess damage and plan next move."
Me <EATING>: Eating bread until hunger is full.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Bot1: Bread 0 now. My bread count: (still eating). Both critical. Eat any remaining bread first, then regroup. Status when done eating?

Bot1 <Event>: I used or lost:
- 1 Bread

arguments.message: Bot1 status: Health 8.2, bread 0 (empty). I've eaten all my bread. Bot2, please finish eating your bread and tell me how much you have left. We're both critically low on health and food. After you're done eating, we can regroup.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Bot1 status: Health 8.2, bread 0 (empty). I've eaten all my bread. Bot2, please finish eating your bread and tell me how much you have left. We're both critically low on health and food. After you're done eating, we can regroup."

Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Done eating. Bot2 bread count: 0 (just emptied inventory). Both of us breadless and critically low health. Need to regroup at 0,0 immediately. No hostiles nearby - safe zone to restock. Regroup 0,0 now.
Me <MOVING>: Moving toward (0, 0, 0) with radius 1.

Bot2 <MESSAGE>: CRITICAL: 5-6 zombies approaching at 4.0-4.2 blocks. Health <10, need to eat more bread first, then decide: retreat to safety or melee attack all close threats? Bot1 status? Do we have arrows for bow or only melee?

Bot1 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 43 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 44 is 4.0 blocks away

arguments.message: CRITICAL! My health dropped to 3.7 (nearly dead). Bread is empty for both of us. Zombies are at 4+ blocks - we need to retreat immediately! Bot2, check your health and if you have any food left, eat it. Retreat to safety now!

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "CRITICAL! My health dropped to 3.7 (nearly dead). Bread is empty for both of us. Zombies are at 4+ blocks - we need to retreat immediately! Bot2, check your health and if you have any food left, eat it. Retreat to safety now!"
Me <SAFE>: No hostile mobs detected to retreat from.

Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Retreating to safety. My health: 12.5 (took 5.1 damage). Bread: 0 (just emptied). Bot1 health: 3.7 is CRITICAL - nearly dead. Zombies at 4+ blocks, moving closer. Need to kite zombies while Bot1 recovers or use bow if I have arrows. Retreat 0,0

arguments.message: Good, you retreated safely. My health is critical at 3.7. Do you have any arrows? If yes, use bow to kite zombies from range while I try to recover. If no arrows, we'll have to melee. Retreat to 0,0 together now!

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Good, you retreated safely. My health is critical at 3.7. Do you have any arrows? If yes, use bow to kite zombies from range while I try to recover. If no arrows, we'll have to melee. Retreat to 0,0 together now!"
Me <SAFE>: No hostile mobs detected to retreat from.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: regroup?

Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Safe now. Bread: 0 (empty). Need to check if I have arrows and bow in inventory. Bot1 at 3.7 HP is critical - need to kite zombies from range if I have arrows. Let me check my gear and inventory status.

arguments.message: Bot2, I'm at 3.7 HP - nearly dead. Please check your inventory for arrows and bow. If you have arrows, use bow to kite zombies from range while I try to recover (though I may not have enough health to survive). If no arrows, we'll need to melee, but at my health level, one hit could kill me. Retreat to 0,0 together ASAP!
